posts.author: A.Krawczyk (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello All,

currently, the forms feature on monday is very very buggy and almost unusable. Whenever I create a new form (WorkForms integrated feature) and edit the form, I can’t see all items that I’ve actually added. However, when I click on “Preview” I can see these items. But as I cannot see them when “editing the formula” I cannot even change or delete them anymore. There are several other bugs as well. Can you please fix the Forms feature on monday???

Overall, Monday.com is really limited and not advisable to be used.

best

posts.author: A.Krawczyk (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
Additionally, in the web-based version not the full scope of a form is being displayed. While only in the App it is being fully displayed. This is really frustrating.

When will this be fixed?
